steps: Create a free IQAir account if you don't have one, or sign in
Once signed in, click the 'Air Quality API' tab in the left navigation menu
Click 'Get API Key' or 'Add' to generate a new API key
Select the Community (free) plan or a paid plan
Copy your API key from the dashboard

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your IQAir AirVisual API key, passed as the 'key' query parameter in all requests

notes: Free Community plan available: 10,000 calls/month, 10 calls/minute
The API key is passed as a query parameter (?key=YOUR_KEY), not an HTTP header
Startup and Enterprise plans available for higher volume and additional data
The free plan includes real-time city/station data and country/state/city listings

test_endpoint.description: List all supported countries (simple read-only endpoint)
